title: Chained Together
description: Chain yourself to other players! Stay within 10 blocks or get pulled back together - inspired by the game "Chained Together"
body:
# ⛓️ Chained Together - Plugin Description

A Minecraft plugin that chains players together, forcing them to stay close! Perfect for co-op gameplay, prison servers, and unique challenges.

## 🎮 Core Features

### Multi-Player Chains
Chain up to 10 players together in a sequence. The first player becomes the **leader** and controls who joins or leaves. Players are physically connected and must stay within a configurable distance (default 5 blocks) or they'll be pulled together!

### Dual Visual Modes
- **Lead Mode**: Uses real Minecraft leads with invisible entities for an authentic look
- **Particle Mode**: Pure particle effects (CRIT, FLAME, HEART, etc.) with zero collision issues

### Smart Chain Management
- Leaders can invite players with `/chain <player>`
- Players accept with `/chainaccept` or deny with `/chaindeny`
- Leaders kick members with `/chainkick <player>`
- Auto-rejoin system when players disconnect and reconnect
- Chains stay intact during temporary disconnects

### Death Mechanics
Choose between two modes:
- **Friendly Respawn** (default): Dead players respawn with their group, even underground!
- **Group Death**: When one dies, everyone dies (hardcore mode)

### Admin Tools
Powerful admin system with a visual GUI (`/chainadmin`):
- Create chains instantly without requests
- Right-click heads to set leaders, left-click to add members
- Break any chain, teleport to chains, view detailed info
- List all active chains on the server

## 📋 Commands

**Players:**
`/chain <player>`, `/chainaccept`, `/chaindeny`, `/unchain`, `/chainlist`, `/chainkick <player>`, `/breakchain`

**Admins:**
`/chainadmin`, `/chainforce`, `/chainbreakall`, `/chaintp`, `/chaininfo`, `/chainlistall`

## ⚙️ Configuration

Fully configurable with sensible defaults:
- Chain distance and pull strength
- Visual mode (leads or particles)
- Death mechanics (friendly or group death)
- PvP between chain members
- Maximum chain size
- Particle type selection

## 🔧 Technical

- **Paper/Spigot 1.21.X** required
- **Java 21** required
- Multi-world support
- Optimized performance
- Automatic cleanup
- Graceful error handling

## 🆘 Support

Found a bug or need help? Report issues on the Discord!
